axes.name: investigation — verify_grid sentinel emit format inspection
axes.method: Read tool/hexa_sim_verify_grid.hexa lines 300-410 (text emit + main runner)
axes.finding: verify_grid emits TWO sentinel layers per invocation: (i) per-axis line via _emit_text() at line 302 → 'AXIS PASS — detail' (stdout, first line); (ii) aggregate line in main() at line 407 → '__HEXA_SIM_VERIFY__ PASS axes=N passed=N warns=N failed=N' (stdout, last line). Separator '---' at line 304 sits between them. Total stdout = 3 lines for single-axis run, no stderr emit on PASS path.

axes.name: investigation — F1-F5 actual outputs (full + tail-3)
axes.method: for f in F1..F5: eval cmd, capture full stdout+stderr, also tail -3
axes.F1_full: CONSTANTS PASS — n=6 number-theoretic constants verified: sigma=12, tau=4, phi=2, sopfr=5, J2=24\n---\n__HEXA_SIM_VERIFY__ PASS axes=1 passed=1 warns=0 failed=0
axes.F2_full: SYMBOLIC PASS — sigma*phi=n*tau=J2=24, alpha^-1=137, n^n=46656, PI_SIM=11197440, Lloyd 10^120 — all exact integer identities\n---\n__HEXA_SIM_VERIFY__ PASS axes=1 passed=1 warns=0 failed=0
axes.F3_full: BYTE_EQ_OK (single line; F3 is byte-eq diff comparator, not axis verifier — pass-token always was BYTE_EQ_OK)
axes.F4_full: OEIS PASS — A000203 sigma + A000005 tau + A000010 phi match for n=1..6\n---\n__HEXA_SIM_VERIFY__ PASS axes=1 passed=1 warns=0 failed=0
axes.F5_full: COUNTER PASS — declared counterexamples (h=6626, e=1602, G=6674 mantissae) remain unrelated to sigma=12 — no over-fit detected\n---\n__HEXA_SIM_VERIFY__ PASS axes=1 passed=1 warns=0 failed=0

axes.name: drift hypothesis falsified — pass tokens DO match
axes.test: for f in F1..F5: full_output | grep -qF "$pass_token" && echo MATCH || echo MISS
axes.F3: MATCH (pass_token='BYTE_EQ_OK' present on line 1; F3 emits no aggregate sentinel)

axes.name: root cause of prior false-positive — tail -3 illusion
axes.mechanism: single-axis verify_grid output = 3 lines exactly. tail -3 returns ALL three (no truncation). However, when the prior reviewer reported actual='__HEXA_SIM_VERIFY__ PASS axes=1...' as a SINGLE line, they likely (i) eyeballed only the most-recent terminal scrollback line, (ii) used a viewer that wrapped the long 'COUNTER PASS — ...' detail to off-screen, or (iii) ran with a subset-of-axes filter that the original report did not record. The verify_grid script has not changed (axis_counter() at line 246-261 emits ['COUNTER','PASS',detail] which _emit_text formats as 'COUNTER PASS — detail').
axes.proof: wc -l of single-axis run output = 3; tail -3 includes line 1 'COUNTER PASS …'; falsifier_health.sh uses grep -qF over full output (line 95) which definitively matches the per-axis token whether placed on line 1 or line 3

axes.name: decision tree resolution — neither Path A nor Path B applies
axes.Path_A_drift_in_verify_grid: REJECTED — verify_grid still emits per-axis sentinel via _emit_text (line 302); aggregate sentinel was ALWAYS additionally emitted by main() at line 407 since the script's initial commit. No drift.
axes.Path_B_grep_explicit: REJECTED — falsifier_health.sh ALREADY uses grep -qF over full output (sh line 95: `printf '%s' "$OUT" | grep -qF "$PASS_TOKEN"`), which matches the per-axis token regardless of line position. No additional grep wrapping needed.
axes.Path_C_no_op: ACCEPTED — F1-F5 cmd/pass entries are correct; no patch needed to falsifiers.jsonl

axes.name: regression confirmation via falsifier_health.sh
axes.registry_summary: total=70 clean=68 hit=0 error=2 (F46/F47 xpoll-convention-guards expected-non-CLEAN)
axes.verdict: all five F1-F5 verify_grid-axis-based falsifiers PASS with their existing cmd/pass entries; no fix needed

lessons: raw 66 ai-native-error-message — when reporting falsifier mismatch, ALWAYS include full stdout (not tail -N) so the next reviewer can verify whether the per-axis sentinel sits on line 1 vs line 3

raw 70 multi-axis-verify dual-sentinel design is by-intent — first-line per-axis line + last-line aggregate. tools that consume verify_grid output should grep -F (substring) over full stdout, never head/tail-bounded

raw 71 — null-result audits still warrant witness so the same false-positive is not re-investigated next cycle (audit cost ≈ 4 minutes, re-investigation cost would recur each future review of falsifier registry)
